SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter

Interface PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R>

Type Parameters:
T - the composite payload type to split
R - the slice type produced by the splitter
All Known Implementing Classes:
BeanFactoryPayloadSplitterLookup
public interface PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R>
Strategy for resolving a PayloadSplitter by qualifier or bean name.

Used by ScatterGatherFailoverHandler to locate the PayloadSplitter named in Failover.payloadSplitter().

Author:
Anand Manissery
See Also:
  • PayloadSplitter

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PayloadSplitter<T,R>
    lookup(String name)
    Returns the PayloadSplitter registered under name, or null if not found.

  • Method Details

    • lookup

      PayloadSplitter<T,R> lookup(String name)
      Returns the PayloadSplitter registered under name, or null if not found.
      Parameters:
      name - qualifier or bean name as declared in @Failover(payloadSplitter = "...")
      Returns:
      matching PayloadSplitter, or null if no match exists
